title: CasX GFP-Targeting gRNA IVT
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5hvis","text":"This protocol explains how to transcribe gRNA in vitro. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4npqc","text":"It’s recommended to perform 8x25μL PCR reactions per gRNA, which results in 3x1mL IVT reactions. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7i185","text":"For safety warnings and hazard information please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Take 10μL sample pre -DNase, mixed with 10 µL, 2x formamide dye for analytical gel. 2x Formamide Dye can be made as follows: 20mL formamide 2.2mL of 100mM (10mM final concentration) EDTA A spatula tip-ful of powdered xylenecyanol A spatula tip-ful of powderedbromophenol blue
Add 50 µL, RNase-Free DNase to each 1 ml reaction.
Return samples to RNase-Free heat block and incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 .
Spin down 4 °C , 00:08:00 , 15000 x g to pellet pyrophosphate.
Move 3mL to a new tube. Add 3 mL, 2x formamide dye .
Keep On ice until Gel Purification. Reaction can be frozen at -80°C.
Centrifuge 4 °C , 4000 rpm , ~ 01:00:00 . Want 1mL each reaction.
Split each into 3 Eppendorf tubes of 333 µL .
Add 0.3 volumes 3 Molarity (M), NaOAc (100uL) to each sample.
Resuspend each sample pellet in 200 µL - 300 µL, DEPC total .
Place eppendorf with pellet on 37 °C heat block with the lid open and a kim-wipe on top for 00:30:00 - 01:00:00 .
Pipette off supernatant.
Add 1 mL, Chilled 100% EtOH (3 volumes) to each sample.
Centrifuge 4 °C , 00:10:00 , 20000 x g .
Combine with other pellets of the same sample.
Add 200 µL, 70% EtOH to wash pellet.
Pipette supernatant off.
Centrifuge samples 4 °C , 00:30:00 , 20000 x g . Do Fast Temp before to make sure it's at 4 °C as soon as samples go in.
Chill in -80 °C at least 02:00:00 .
Nanodrop RNA.
Label and put RNA at -80 °C .
Pre-run, 25 W for about 00:30:00 or until metal plate is warm.
Heat denature samples at 65 °C , 00:10:00 .
Load each sample into separate wells.
Take gel out and sandwich between saran wrap.
Use UV shadowing to identify RNA bands.
Highlight bands with sharpie.
With clean razor blade, cut out bands and place in 50 ml Falcon tube.
Crush gel pieces with RNase Free serological pipette.
Add 14.5 mL, DEPC , 500 µL, NaOAc . Want: 5mL of DEPC/NaOAc per 1mL of IVT reaction and 1/30 NaOAc.
Rock at 4 °C , Overnight .
Cast large 15% Urea-PAGE gel: 250 mL, 15% Urea-PAGE 250 µL, TEMED 833 µL, 30% APS

Prepare amplification reactions (x8) (plus 1.1x for pipette error) for each sgRNA. 8.8 µL, Oligo 1 Primer (10μM) 8.8 µL, Oligo 2 Primer (10μM) 8.8 µL, Oligo 3 Primer (10μM) 4.4 µL, dNTPs (10mM) 44 µL, Q5 Buffer 2.2 µL, Q5 Polymerase 143 µL, DEPC Amplification reactions of 8.8x are recommended, but the 1x Q5 PCR reaction is as follows (able to scale up or down): 1μL (10μM) Oligo 1 Primer 1μL (10μM) Oligo 2 Primer 1μL (10μM) Oligo 3 Primer 0.5μL (10mM) dNTPs 5μL Q5 Buffer 0.25μL Q5 Polymerase 16.25μL DEPC

Run using PCR conditions as follows: 1 cycle: 00:00:30 , 98 °C (initial denaturation) 35 cycles of: 00:00:10 , 98 °C (denaturation) 00:00:20 , 51 °C (annealing) 00:00:20 , 72 °C (extension) 1 cycle: 00:02:00 , 72 °C (final extension) Hold at 4 °C . Reaction can be frozen at -20°C.
Run some reaction mix on an agarose gel to check PCR product size.
From the 200μL PCR reactions (25μL x 8 tubes), split into 3 tubes of 66.6μL. Each tube will have a final volume of 1mL after IVT. The PCR product doesn’t need to be cleaned before IVT.
For each 1mL IVT reaction, add the following: 100 µL, 10x IVT buffer 200 µL, 5x NTPs 100 µL, T7 Polymerase 40 µL, RNase Inhibitor 66.6 µL, DNA template (15ug) (from previous step) 493.4 µL, DEPC
Incubate in RNase free heat block at 37 °C , Overnight .
Add 100 µL, 10x DNase Buffer to each 1mL reaction.
Take 10μL sample post -DNase, mixed with 10 µL, 2x formamide dye for analytical gel.
Filter sample through 0.22μm Corning Filter into 50mL tubes and keep On ice
Move samples to 15mL Amicon 3kDa MWCO Concentrators.
Repeat wash step: add 200 µL, 70% EtOH per pellet in sample.
Pipette off supernatant.
Centrifuge 4 °C , 00:10:00 , 20000 x g .
Centrifuge 4 °C , 00:10:00 , 20000 x g .
creator: Meredith Triplet
